pi_items.source: Web search confirmed video ID aqz-KE-bpKQ points to 'Big Buck Bunny 60fps 4K - Official Blender Foundation Short Film'; URL format verified as valid YouTube watch URL
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 19 uses MEETING_URL with /fitness-demo-session suffix; export_result.sh line 14 checks for this room name in window title
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 14 explicitly checks for 'fitness-demo-session' in window title with grep pattern 'fitness-demo-session|Jitsi Meet'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires sharing a real YouTube video (Big Buck Bunny 60fps 4K, video ID aqz-KE-bpKQ) in a Jitsi Meet meeting room named 'fitness-demo-session'. The meeting room name 'fitness-demo-session' is used as the window title identifier to verify the meeting is active. All metadata values are consistent with the actual code that sets up and verifies the task.
